title: leucosceptrum stellipilum var. radicans
intro: Leucosceptrum stellipilum var. radicans, also known as the 'Wild Indigo' or 'Starry Indigo', is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucosceptrum stellipilum var. radicans include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Thai and Indonesian herbalism.
